initial_draft:

```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering a trade that gives me resources without me giving anything up. This is the best outcome in a single-round game. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
